title: Docker Buildx CI, Tests, Context, Cache, and Multi-Platform Output · CI/CD Retrieval
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs docker buildx ci, tests, context, cache, and multi-platform output from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the container build and test workflow under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for container build and test workflow after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure official Docker setup and build actions with explicit Git or path context, Dockerfile, target, platforms, inputs, and output mode.
Use secret mounts, scoped cache backends, deterministic keys, trusted writers, and no credential-bearing ARG, layer, log, or attestation.
Test image configuration, non-root and read-only behavior, health, signals, resources, network, changed config, and failure before registry mutation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ci Buildx Action Context Contract
steps.instruction:
Order the Ci Buildx Action Context Contract delivery-system evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ci Buildx Action Context Contract.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Ci Buildx Action Context Contract assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ci Buildx Action Context Contract, keep Ci Buildx Action Context Contract connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: A review Buildx workflow leaks a secret through ARG, trusts a fork cache, builds only amd64, pushes before tests, and cannot tie output to source. Separate builder, context, platforms, cache, test, secret, and digest evidence. Competency probe: Configure official Docker setup and build actions with explicit Git or path context, Dockerfile, target, platforms, inputs, and output mode.
